Health Services

At Doğuş University, health services are carried out under the General Secretariat by a specialist physician and a specialist psychologist.

The Health Unit was established to conduct the personal health issues of employees and students within the framework of patient rights, carefully, meticulously, and confidentially.

University health services are provided through free examinations for students and staff who directly apply to the health center and referrals to healthcare institutions when necessary.
